innovation.label: // AI & INNOVATION
innovation.heading: Building the
innovation.description: Integrating Generative AI workflows, LLM-powered features, and intelligent automation into production applications that serve enterprise clients and millions of users.

aboutSection.currentRole: leading frontend development and shipping Generative AI features into production systems

highlights: Leading frontend development for web and mobile applications, focusing on scalable UI architecture, performance optimization, and maintainable component systems.

Built and delivered Generative AI–driven projects, integrating LLM-powered features such as AI analysis, multimedia responses, document research, summarization, and workflow automation into production applications.
Collaborated with backend and product teams to design APIs and data flows supporting AI-powered features and real-time interactions.
Owned frontend architecture decisions and mentored team members during feature development and releases.
Delivered full-stack solutions for enterprise clients, including KPMG, RBL, Vodafone, Indian Oil, American Express, Croma, and Asian Paints.
Led client discussions to gather requirements, proposed technical solutions, and owned the execution of key features across multiple projects.
Built scalable React and Next.js applications while integrating backend APIs and authentication flows.
Worked on in-house full stack web applications, contributing to feature development, problem-solving, and clean code practices.

projects.title: Sophius AI
projects.description: Led frontend development and took ownership of Sophius AI, redesigning the entire frontend architecture to improve scalability, maintainability, and performance.
highlights: Optimized the application by reducing bundle size and improving load performance by 50% through architectural refactoring, code splitting, and Service Worker implementation.
Built advanced interactive features including an in-browser code editor and runner, AI-integrated image editor, interactive Plotly dashboards, and Google Maps–based visualizations.
Integrated Generative AI workflows using LangChain and backend services to support AI responses, document research, multimedia multilanguage outputs, and data-driven analysis.
Developed and shipped Android and iOS applications using WebView-based architecture, ensuring feature and performance across platforms.

projects.title: Indian Oil
projects.description: Designed and implemented the frontend architecture of the application, ensuring optimal performance and scalability.
highlights: Designed and implemented the frontend architecture of the application, ensuring optimal performance and scalability.

After a year, optimized and redesigned several components, and redesigned the base using Vite.js, Web Workers and React Memoization Technique to enhance the performance and scalability of the UI and development by up to 50%.

projects.title: Lepton Maps
projects.description: Developed a data visualization dashboard using DeckGL.js, providing stakeholders with real-time insights and improving decision-making processes.
highlights: Developed a data visualization dashboard using DeckGL.js, providing stakeholders with real-time insights and improving decision-making processes and built role-based dynamic user interfaces.
Built a CI/CD pipeline using Git and Vercel, reducing deployment time by 40% and ensuring consistent and reliable releases.

projects.title: Smart Market
projects.description: Enterprise application with role-based dynamic UI, resizable panels, data caching, and reusable component packages.
highlights: Developed a role-based dynamic UI with resizable panels, implemented data caching to enhance frontend data, integrated session timeout functionality, and created reusable packages and components for improved reusability.
Converted data fetching to TanStack (using Query) to enhance performance and handle large data amounts.
Implemented Web Workers and custom hooks and React Memoization Technique to enhance UI performance by 45%.

projects.title: API Health and Consumption Monitor
projects.description: Built an API health check script and interface integrated with Slack and email for real-time API monitoring and failure tracking.
highlights: Built an API health check script and interface integrated with Slack and email. Send markdown-designed messages to Slack and email regarding API failures.
Track records in a database to show tracking and API status on the UI.

projects.title: RBL Gateway
projects.description: Implemented secure communication with encryption using OpenPGP and established a secure gateway.
highlights: Implemented secure communication with encryption using OpenPGP and established a secure gateway.

projects.title: Smart Campus
projects.description: Created 3D objects and buildings to enhance the visibility of telecom clients.
highlights: Created 3D objects and buildings to enhance the visibility of telecom clients.
